column2: # Weekend change in span hours (Weekend - Weekday)
# Order lines by biggest weekend reduction
# Offset weekday/weekend slightly so both are visible
aes(x = first_hr, xend = last_hr, y = y_off, yend = y_off, color = day_type, text = hover),
geom_point(aes(x = first_hr, y = y_off, color = day_type, text = hover), size = 2.2) +
geom_point(aes(x = last_hr,  y = y_off, color = day_type, text = hover), size = 2.2) +
# Put span-hours label INSIDE each bar (middle) to avoid overlap
aes(x = mid_hr, y = y_off, label = paste0(sprintf("%.1f", span_hours), "h")),
# Only show delta labels for routes where weekends differ meaningfully
aes(x = last_hr + 0.6, y = y_off, label = paste0("Δ", sprintf("%+.1f", delta_hours), "h")),
subtitle = "Each bar is first → last scheduled departure. Numbers inside = total span hours. Δ shown only if ≥ 0.5h.",
# Keep W/Z story annotations, but move farther right so they don't collide
aes(x = 26.6, y = y_off, label = label),  # fixed x position near right
